features.name: unpacked array port with concatenation connection
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array port declaration connected via concatenation operator, where the concatenation produces a different dimensionality than the port expects

features.name: module port array using macro dimension
features.description: Code should include a module port declared as an unpacked array where the array size is defined by a preprocessor macro
features.snippet:
output mc_id_t id_out [`NUM_PORTS-1:0];
input mc_addr_t addr0_in [`NUM_PORTS-1:0];

features.name: concatenation in module port connection
features.description: Code should include concatenation operator {} used to connect multiple signals to a module port
